title: lathyrus alpestris
intro: Lathyrus alpestris, also known as the alpine peavine or alpine pea, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The seeds of Lathyrus alpestris contain a compound called lathyrogene, which has been shown to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
